description: An emergency management analyst needs to create concentric evacuation zones around three hazard locations in the San Francisco Bay Area. Using the point data from /home/ga/GIS_Data/sample_points.geojson, generate a multi-ring buffer with 3 rings at 500-meter intervals. Ensure the processing uses a metric CRS (EPSG:32610) for accurate distance measurement. Export the final evacuation zones as a GeoJSON file in WGS84 (EPSG:4326) to /home/ga/GIS_Data/exports/evacuation_zones.geojson.
